title: anaphalis viridis var. viridis
intro: Anaphalis viridis var. viridis, also known as the Green Pincushion Plant or Alpine Pincushion, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anaphalis viridis var. viridis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
